title: Reintegrated: Chipped
description: Integrating Chipped into vanilla biomes and structures.
body:
# Reintegrated: Chipped

This mod aims to smoothly integrate the blocks from the Chipped mod into vanilla's biomes and structures. This includes features such as:

- Hanging Cobwebs in Dungeons
- Torch variants in all Villages
- Many variants of crimson/warped roots in their respective forest biomes

...and more!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5Rel2hNl/images/613b0f0e89abaeccb386f759278f008717a3cb03.png)
